title: henckelia miniata
intro: Henckelia miniata, also known as the red flowered lip orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant contains compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties, providing potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Henckelia miniata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
